name: Pasta Salad (Good for Picnics)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the tortellini according to package directions.
2. Drain and rinse the artichoke hearts, then cut into quarters.
3. Add the remaining salad makings (excluding parmesan) and toss with the dressing.
4. Sprinkle generously with parmesan cheese and refrigerate.
5. Adjust salt in the dressing as needed due to additional cheese content.
